overall.description: A first-person walkthrough of a futuristic cyberpunk city at night during heavy rain. The player character navigates wet streets, ascends stairs to an upper plaza, crosses a neon-lit intersection, and continues along covered sidewalks beneath elevated highways, passing holographic advertisements and pedestrians with umbrellas. The footage is from Cyberpunk 2077 with high-fidelity ray-traced lighting and reflective wet surfaces.

slowing down as approaching the concrete staircase ahead

agents.ego_description: walking down the rain-soaked street toward a staircase, observing the holographic billboards

segments.scene_description: The scene opens on a rain-soaked futuristic city street at night, dominated by a massive holographic billboard on the left. The camera walks forward over wet asphalt reflecting neon lights, as a vehicle approaches and passes by. The street is empty of pedestrians but lined with towering buildings and industrial street lamps.

scene_state.functional_zone: concrete staircase with red railings leading to upper city level

events.description: leaving street level and beginning ascent of concrete staircase
reaching top of stairs and turning right onto upper platform

agents.ego_description: climbing the concrete stairs with red railings to reach the upper city level

entered.detail: wide weathered concrete stairs with red metal railings on both sides
glowing green digital display showing abstract imagery at the top of the stairs
single leafy tree growing on the upper concrete platform

segments.scene_description: The camera ascends a wide concrete staircase with red railings, leaving the street level behind. The environment becomes partially sheltered from the rain under building overhangs. At the top, a green holographic billboard and a small tree become visible before the camera turns right onto the upper platform.

scene_state.functional_zone: upper city plaza with crosswalk and neon hotel

events.description: exiting staircase area onto open upper plaza with crosswalk

agents.ego_description: crossing the yellow-striped pedestrian crosswalk in front of the neon-lit hotel

entered.detail: broad pedestrian crossing with bold yellow stripes on dark asphalt
large glowing purple sign with Japanese text HOテル and 24h notation
elevated highway or monorail track running parallel to the street

segments.scene_description: Emerging onto an open upper plaza, the camera crosses a broad yellow-striped crosswalk. A prominent purple neon hotel sign glows ahead, while an elevated highway structure runs along the left. A red sports car is parked near the hotel entrance as the rain continues to fall on the exposed concrete surface.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered sidewalk under elevated highway with storefronts

events.description: turning left to walk under the overpass structure
vehicles passing on the street to the right

agents.ego_description: walking along the covered sidewalk beneath the elevated highway, passing storefronts

notable_agents.action: man in sleeveless jacket walking toward camera on the sidewalk

entered.detail: storefront with yellow EL DORADO signage and PAWN SHOP text
safety railings with yellow bands along the sidewalk edge
traffic light pole with pedestrian signal and advertisement screen

segments.scene_description: The camera turns left to walk beneath the elevated highway overpass, entering a more sheltered environment. The El Dorado pawn shop with its yellow signage is visible on the right, while green metal railings line the sidewalk. A pedestrian approaches from the opposite direction as vehicles pass on the adjacent street.

scene_state.functional_zone: city sidewalk with pedestrians and distant neon signage

events.description: increased pedestrian presence with umbrellas walking toward camera
approaching intersection with red traffic lights visible ahead

agents.ego_description: continuing along the wet sidewalk, passing pedestrians carrying umbrellas in the rain

notable_agents.action: person with green umbrella and white outfit walking toward camera
person with dark umbrella and green jacket walking toward camera

entered.detail: red glowing signs and billboards visible down the street in the distance
low concrete wall separating sidewalk from lower street level

segments.scene_description: Continuing along the exposed sidewalk, the camera passes multiple pedestrians carrying umbrellas to shield from the heavy rain. The overpass recedes into the distance on the right while distant red neon signs glow ahead. A concrete barrier separates the walkway from the lower street level as the camera approaches a traffic light intersection.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a rain-slicked city street up into a sheltered urban plaza and along a neon-lit highway underpass. It begins on wet asphalt beneath a massive holographic billboard, moving forward as a vehicle passes through the reflections of the night city. As the camera ascends a wide concrete staircase with red railings, the environment shifts from the open street to a partially sheltered upper platform featuring a green hologram and a small tree. The scene then opens onto a broad plaza where the camera crosses a yellow-striped crosswalk toward a glowing purple hotel sign and a parked red sports car. Finally, the movement turns beneath the heavy concrete of an elevated highway, passing the yellow signage of a pawn shop and several pedestrians with umbrellas before approaching a distant red-lit intersection.
